mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, res_id, res_inst_id, res_desc, res_path, level_one, level_two, level_three, level_four, start_time, end_time, kind_type, res_auth_label
id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, res_id, res_inst_id, res_desc, res_path, level_one, level_two, level_three, level_four, start_time, end_time, kind_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_res_auth WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and res_id = #{resId} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind} and res_path like concat(#{path},'%')

SELECT
FROM dm_res_auth WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and res_id = #{resId} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind} and res_path = #{path}

SELECT
FROM dm_res_auth WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind}

SELECT
FROM dm_res_auth WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dm_res_auth WHERE res_path like concat(#{prefixPath}, '%') and kind_type = #{kindType}
DELETE FROM dm_res_auth WHERE end_time is not null and end_time <= #{endTime}
delete FROM dm_res_auth WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and res_id = #{resId} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind} and res_path = #{path}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_res_auth WHERE res_id = #{resId} and owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and res_path = #{resPath} and kind_type = #{authKind,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.security.auth.AuthKind}
